---
name: Bug Report
about: A skill step is unclear, produces wrong output, or references a missing file
title: "[BUG] skill-name: short description"
labels: bug
---

## Skill

Which skill has the issue? (company-research / positioning-playbook / battlecard / call-plan / product-launch)

## What happened

Describe what the skill did that was incorrect.

## What you expected

Describe what you expected it to do instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Command or input you used
2. What Claude output

## Context

- Any input materials you provided (rough description, not the full content)
- Claude Code version if known
